items.title: Microbiome and metabolites impact enteric and central nervous systems in ALS.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) has been linked to gastrointestinal symptoms and alterations in the gut microbiota. The enteric nervous system (ENS) coordinates intestinal function and sits at the host-microbe interface. The mechanisms by which luminal changes relay to the central nervous system (CNS), where motor neurons reside, have yet to be completely defined. In this narrative review, we first present evidence from ALS patient cohorts and preclinical models alongside mechanistic studies of infection, dysbiosis, and related neurodegenerative diseases to discuss how the microbiota and its metabolites may affect the ENS and CNS in ALS. Next, we propose a plausible mechanism of ALS pathogenesis through the gut-microbiome-brain axis. We further offer a summary of clinical trials that have studied the impacts of the microbiota on human ALS. Finally, we discuss future directions for studies of microbiota-ENS-CNS interactions in ALS. Better understanding of the dynamic interactions among the microbiota, microbial metabolites, neuroactive metabolites, and inflammation through the ENS/CNS in ALS will provide innovative insights into ALS prevention and treatment.
items.titleZh: 微生物组和代谢物影响ALS中的肠道和中枢神经系统
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了ALS患者和动物模型中肠道微生物群及其代谢物如何通过肠-微生物组-脑轴影响肠道和中枢神经系统，并提出了可能的发病机制。文章还回顾了相关临床试验，指出未来研究应聚焦于微生物群、代谢物和炎症之间的动态相互作用。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS中微生物组与神经系统的双向通信证据，提出了一个可验证的肠-脑轴致病模型，为ALS研究者提供了从肠道干预角度探索新治疗靶点的理论基础。

aiRead.keyFinding: 微生物群及其代谢物通过肠-微生物组-脑轴影响ALS中的肠道和中枢神经系统，可能通过ENS-CNS相互作用驱动疾病进展。
aiRead.limitation: 作为叙述性综述，结论基于现有文献的整合，缺乏原始实验数据验证，且提出的机制模型需进一步在临床前和临床研究中证实。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对ALS患者肠道微生物群调节的临床试验结果，以及微生物代谢物（如短链脂肪酸）对ENS和运动神经元功能的直接作用研究。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）与胃肠道症状和肠道微生物群改变有关。肠道神经系统（ENS）协调肠道功能，并位于宿主-微生物界面。管腔变化如何传递到运动神经元所在的中枢神经系统（CNS）的机制尚未完全明确。在这篇叙述性综述中，我们首先呈现来自ALS患者队列和临床前模型的证据，以及感染、菌群失调和相关神经退行性疾病的机制研究，以讨论微生物群及其代谢物如何影响ALS中的ENS和CNS。接着，我们通过肠-微生物组-脑轴提出了一种ALS发病机制的合理机制。我们进一步总结了研究微生物群对人类ALS影响的临床试验。最后，我们讨论了ALS中微生物群-ENS-CNS相互作用研究的未来方向。更好地理解ALS中微生物群、微生物代谢物、神经活性代谢物和炎症通过ENS/CNS的动态相互作用，将为ALS的预防和治疗提供创新见解。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，整合了最新的ALS患者队列和临床前模型数据，提出了肠-微生物组-脑轴在ALS发病中的前沿机制，具有直接的ALS转化研究价值。

items.title: Therapeutic frontiers in ALS: iPSC-based drug discovery, cell therapy, and gene therapy-Advances through 2026.
items.summary: Three converging therapeutic paradigms-iPSC-based drug discovery, cell transplantation, and gene therapy-have substantially expanded the therapeutic pipeline for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) between 2020 and 2026. The FDA's accelerated approval of tofersen (Qalsody) in April 2023 marked the first treatment targeting a genetic cause of ALS. iPSC-derived drug candidates, including ropinirole and bosutinib, have completed early-phase clinical trials led by Japanese institutions. Cell therapies targeting neuroinflammation through regulatory T cells are being actively explored as immunomodulatory strategies, although efficacy remains to be established in adequately powered trials. Next-generation gene-silencing approaches-including RNA interference (RNAi) therapeutics and AAV-delivered microRNA-entered first-in-human trials in 2024-2025. The identification of STMN2 as a downstream target of TDP-43 dysfunction has opened a potential TDP-43-downstream nucleic acid therapeutic avenue for sporadic ALS, which constitutes approximately 90% of all cases, with company-reported interim data suggesting target engagement in the ongoing Phase 1/2 ANQUR trial (QRL-201). This review synthesizes the latest evidence across all three therapeutic domains, with attention to the hierarchy of evidence, regulatory milestones, and the pioneering contributions of Japanese research groups.
items.titleZh: ALS治疗前沿：基于iPSC的药物发现、细胞治疗和基因治疗——截至2026年的进展
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了2020-2026年间ALS治疗领域的三大进展：iPSC药物发现、细胞治疗和基因治疗。FDA批准了首个针对ALS遗传病因的药物tofersen；日本团队主导的iPSC衍生药物进入早期临床；针对TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法在散发性ALS中显示出靶点结合证据。
items.insight: 该综述系统梳理了ALS治疗从基因靶向到细胞免疫调节再到核酸疗法的多路径进展，尤其强调了TDP-43下游靶点STMN2在散发性ALS中的转化潜力，为研究者提供了全面的前沿动态和证据等级参考。

aiRead.keyFinding: 2020-2026年间，ALS治疗在iPSC药物发现、细胞治疗和基因治疗三大领域取得显著进展，包括FDA批准首个针对遗传病因的药物tofersen，以及针对TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法在散发性ALS中显示靶点结合。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始数据；细胞治疗和部分基因疗法的疗效尚未在充分有力的试验中确立。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注ANQUR试验（QRL-201）的完整数据公布，以及iPSC衍生药物（如罗匹尼罗和博舒替尼）的后续临床试验结果。

items.abstractZh: 三种汇聚的治疗范式——基于iPSC的药物发现、细胞移植和基因治疗——在2020年至2026年间显著扩展了肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）的治疗管线。2023年4月，FDA加速批准tofersen（Qalsody），标志着首个针对ALS遗传病因的治疗方法。由日本机构主导的iPSC衍生候选药物（包括罗匹尼罗和博舒替尼）已完成早期临床试验。通过调节性T细胞靶向神经炎症的细胞疗法正在作为免疫调节策略被积极探索，但其疗效尚需在充分有力的试验中确立。下一代基因沉默方法——包括RNA干扰（RNAi）疗法和AAV递送的microRNA——于2024-2025年进入首次人体试验。STMN2被确定为TDP-43功能障碍的下游靶点，为散发性ALS（约占所有病例的90%）开辟了一条潜在的TDP-43下游核酸治疗途径，公司报告的期中数据表明，正在进行的1/2期ANQUR试验（QRL-201）中已观察到靶点结合。本综述综合了这三个治疗领域的最新证据，关注证据等级、监管里程碑以及日本研究团队的先驱贡献。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述涵盖截至2026年的最新进展，包括FDA批准的基因靶向药物、iPSC衍生药物的早期临床数据以及针对TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法，具有高度的ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Cholesterol in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: a bystander, a biomarker, or a target?
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a fatal neurodegenerative disorder characterized by progressive motor neuron loss. In addition to the different pathogenic mechanisms, in recent years, increasing attention has been directed toward the role of lipid metabolism in ALS pathogenesis, although the clinical relevance of lipid alterations in ALS may differ from their well-established role in cardiovascular disease. This review critically examines the multifactorial relationship between cholesterol and ALS through three perspectives: (1) as a risk factor for disease onset, (2) as a prognostic biomarker of disease progression, and (3) as a potential therapeutic target. Epidemiological and genetic studies suggest a complex and sometimes contradictory association between lipid profile and ALS risk. Elevated LDL-cholesterol and total cholesterol have been linked to increased disease susceptibility in some cohorts, with Mendelian randomization studies supporting a potential causal role. Conversely, evidence regarding HDL-cholesterol remains conflicting and may be influenced by sex-specific and metabolic factors. As a prognostic biomarker, hyperlipidemia has been variably associated with prolonged survival in ALS patients; however, these findings often lose significance after adjusting for body mass index and nutritional status, suggesting that lipid levels may reflect systemic metabolic reserve rather than directly modulating disease progression. Pharmacological modulation of cholesterol reveals further complexity. While statins are generally not associated with increased ALS risk in clinical studies, preclinical models show divergent effects: some statins accelerate disease progression, while others like lovastatin may be protective. Other lipid-lowering drugs, including fibrates and PCSK9 inhibitors, may also influence ALS-related pathways beyond cholesterol lowering, although their potential role remains to be clarified.
items.titleZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化中的胆固醇：旁观者、生物标志物还是治疗靶点？
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述系统分析了胆固醇在ALS中的三重角色：作为发病风险因素、预后生物标志物和潜在治疗靶点。流行病学和遗传学证据显示，LDL和总胆固醇升高可能增加ALS风险，但HDL的作用存在争议。高脂血症与患者生存期延长的关联在调整营养状态后减弱，提示其可能反映代谢储备而非直接调控疾病。他汀类药物在临床中未显著增加ALS风险，但动物实验中效果不一，洛伐他汀可能具有保护作用。
items.insight: 该综述整合了流行病学、遗传学和临床前研究，揭示了胆固醇与ALS关系的复杂性和矛盾性，为未来设计针对脂质代谢的干预策略提供了关键背景，并强调了在解读血脂作为生物标志物时必须考虑营养状态等混杂因素。

aiRead.keyFinding: 胆固醇与ALS的关系复杂：高LDL可能增加风险，但高脂血症与生存期延长的关联受营养状态影响；他汀类药物临床安全性良好，但动物实验效果不一。
aiRead.limitation: 综述基于现有文献，未提供原始数据；不同研究间存在异质性，且因果关系尚未明确。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对PCSK9抑制剂等新型降脂药物在ALS中的临床前和临床研究，以及考虑营养状态校正后的血脂生物标志物验证研究。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化（ALS）是一种以进行性运动神经元丢失为特征的致命性神经退行性疾病。除了不同的致病机制外，近年来，脂质代谢在ALS发病机制中的作用日益受到关注，尽管脂质改变在ALS中的临床意义可能与其在心血管疾病中已确立的作用不同。本综述通过三个视角批判性地审视了胆固醇与ALS之间的多因素关系：（1）作为疾病发病的风险因素，（2）作为疾病进展的预后生物标志物，以及（3）作为潜在的治疗靶点。流行病学和遗传学研究表明，血脂谱与ALS风险之间存在复杂且有时矛盾的关联。在一些队列中，升高的低密度脂蛋白胆固醇和总胆固醇与疾病易感性增加相关，孟德尔随机化研究支持其潜在的因果作用。相反，关于高密度脂蛋白胆固醇的证据仍然存在矛盾，并可能受到性别特异性和代谢因素的影响。作为预后生物标志物，高脂血症与ALS患者生存期延长存在可变关联；然而，在调整体重指数和营养状况后，这些发现往往失去显著性，表明血脂水平可能反映全身代谢储备，而非直接调节疾病进展。胆固醇的药理学调节揭示了进一步的复杂性。虽然他汀类药物在临床研究中通常与ALS风险增加无关，但临床前模型显示出不同的效果：一些他汀类药物加速疾病进展，而另一些如洛伐他汀可能具有保护作用。其他降脂药物，包括贝特类和PCSK9抑制剂，也可能通过降低胆固醇以外的途径影响ALS相关通路，尽管其潜在作用仍有待阐明。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，系统整合了近期关于胆固醇在ALS中多重角色的证据，直接关联ALS的发病机制、生物标志物和治疗转化价值。

items.title: The role of SUMOylation in regulating proteins that drive neuronal disease progression.
items.summary: SUMOylation is a post-translational modification in which a Small Ubiquitin-like Modifier (SUMO) protein is reversibly attached to a lysine residue on a target protein in an ATP-dependent process. This modification can affect the function of target proteins by enhancing their stability or changing cellular translocation, thereby making SUMOylation a critical regulator in the pathogenesis of multiple diseases. The functional consequences of SUMOylation, however, are highly context dependent. In Alzheimer's disease, SUMOylation stabilizes proteins that drive disease progression and enhances neurotoxicity, thereby exacerbating these conditions. Similarly, in Progressive Supranuclear Palsy, SUMO-1 conjugation stabilizes truncated tau and blocks its ubiquitination, whereas SUMO-2/3 conjugation promotes Tau clearance and recovery from neuroinflammation, illustrating how distinct SUMO paralogues can exert opposing effects within the same disease. Conversely, increased SUMOylation can be neuroprotective in cerebral ischemia and Parkinson's disease by promoting autophagic clearance of pathogenic proteins. Beyond alterations in protein stability, aberrant SUMOylation can also lead to mis-localization of target proteins, which has been identified as a pathogenic mechanism in disorders such as Huntington's disease and Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis that results in impaired clearance and pathogenic buildup, which results in neuronal death. From a therapeutic standpoint, the SUMO inhibitor TAK-981 has shown promise in both Multiple Sclerosis and in pre-clinical glioblastoma models, underscoring the translational potential of targeting of this pathway. This review examines the multifaceted role of SUMOylation across diverse neurological conditions, evaluates the therapeutic potential of SUMO inhibitors and activators, and highlights the opportunities and challenges of modulating this pathway in currently incurable neurological disorders.
items.titleZh: SUMO化修饰在调控驱动神经元疾病进展的蛋白质中的作用
items.summaryZh: SUMO化修饰通过改变蛋白质稳定性和定位，在多种神经退行性疾病中发挥双重作用：在阿尔茨海默病和进行性核上性麻痹中加剧病理，而在脑缺血和帕金森病中具有保护作用。在ALS和亨廷顿病中，异常SUMO化导致蛋白错误定位和清除障碍。SUMO抑制剂TAK-981在临床前模型中显示出治疗潜力。
items.insight: 这篇综述系统梳理了SUMO化在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的矛盾角色，特别是不同SUMO同源物（SUMO-1 vs SUMO-2/3）在同一疾病中可能产生相反效应，为ALS中靶向SUMO通路的精准干预提供了重要理论基础。

aiRead.keyFinding: SUMO化在神经退行性疾病中具有情境依赖的双重作用：不同SUMO同源物可产生相反效应，且异常SUMO化通过影响蛋白定位和清除驱动ALS等疾病进展。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始实验数据；SUMO抑制剂在ALS中的直接临床前或临床证据尚不充分。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注SUMO抑制剂TAK-981在ALS动物模型中的疗效验证，以及不同SUMO同源物在ALS患者组织中的表达谱研究。

items.abstractZh: SUMO化是一种翻译后修饰，其中小泛素样修饰蛋白（SUMO）以ATP依赖的方式可逆地连接到靶蛋白的赖氨酸残基上。这种修饰可以通过增强靶蛋白的稳定性或改变其细胞定位来影响其功能，从而使SUMO化成为多种疾病发病机制中的关键调节因子。然而，SUMO化的功能后果高度依赖于具体情境。在阿尔茨海默病中，SUMO化稳定了驱动疾病进展的蛋白质并增强了神经毒性，从而加剧了这些病症。类似地，在进行性核上性麻痹中，SUMO-1结合稳定了截短的tau蛋白并阻断其泛素化，而SUMO-2/3结合则促进tau蛋白清除和神经炎症恢复，说明不同的SUMO同源物在同一疾病中可发挥相反的作用。相反，在脑缺血和帕金森病中，增加的SUMO化可通过促进致病蛋白的自噬清除而起到神经保护作用。除了改变蛋白质稳定性外，异常的SUMO化还可导致靶蛋白的错误定位，这已被确定为亨廷顿病和肌萎缩侧索硬化症等疾病的致病机制，导致清除障碍和致病性积累，进而导致神经元死亡。从治疗角度来看，SUMO抑制剂TAK-981在多发性硬化症和临床前胶质母细胞瘤模型中显示出前景，强调了靶向该通路的转化潜力。本综述考察了SUMO化在不同神经系统疾病中的多方面作用，评估了SUMO抑制剂和激活剂的治疗潜力，并强调了在目前无法治愈的神经系统疾病中调节该通路的机遇与挑战。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，系统总结了SUMO化在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的最新机制进展，并评估了SUMO抑制剂TAK-981的转化潜力，具有高度的ALS相关性和新近性。

items.title: Deletion of exon 2 in ALS-linked Sptlc1 causes lethality in homozygous mice but not in heterozygotes.
items.summary: Mutations in the human SPTLC1 gene have recently been linked to early-onset amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), characterized by global atrophy, motor impairments, and symptoms such as tongue fasciculations. All known ALS-linked SPTLC1 mutations cluster within exon 2, and a specific variant, c.58G>T, results in exon 2 skipping. However, it is unclear how the exon 2 deletion affects SPTLC1 function in vivo and contributes to ALS pathogenesis. Leveraging the high genomic sequence similarity between mouse and human SPTLC1 , we created a novel knock-in mouse model with a CRISPR/Cas9-mediated deletion of exon 2 in the endogenous murine Sptlc1 locus. Although heterozygous mice did not develop motor defects or ALS-like neuropathology, homozygous mutants died prematurely. These findings provide valuable insights into SPTLC1 exon 2 biology and serve as a useful resource for future mechanistic studies.
items.titleZh: ALS相关Sptlc1基因外显子2缺失导致纯合子小鼠致死，但杂合子小鼠存活
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过CRISPR/Cas9技术构建了Sptlc1外显子2缺失的小鼠模型，发现纯合子小鼠致死，而杂合子小鼠未出现运动或神经病理异常，提示外显子2对SPTLC1功能至关重要，但单拷贝缺失不足以引发ALS样表型。
items.insight: 该研究首次在体内验证了ALS相关SPTLC1外显子2缺失的致病性，明确了纯合缺失的致死性，为理解SPTLC1突变导致早发性ALS的机制提供了关键动物模型，值得ALS研究者关注其后续的机制探索。

aiRead.keyFinding: Sptlc1外显子2纯合缺失导致小鼠致死，而杂合缺失不引起运动缺陷或ALS样神经病理。
aiRead.limitation: 杂合子小鼠未表现出ALS表型，可能无法完全模拟人类疾病；仅关注外显子2缺失，未涵盖其他SPTLC1突变类型。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续研究应探索外显子2缺失如何影响鞘脂代谢通路，并尝试在杂合子中引入其他应激条件以诱发ALS表型。

items.abstractZh: 人类SPTLC1基因的突变最近被关联到早发性肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS），其特征为全身性萎缩、运动障碍以及舌肌束颤等症状。所有已知的ALS相关SPTLC1突变均聚集在外显子2内，其中特定变异c.58G>T导致外显子2跳跃。然而，外显子2缺失如何影响SPTLC1在体内的功能并促进ALS发病机制尚不清楚。利用小鼠和人类SPTLC1之间高度相似的基因组序列，我们通过CRISPR/Cas9介导的内源性小鼠Sptlc1位点外显子2缺失，创建了一种新型敲入小鼠模型。尽管杂合子小鼠未出现运动缺陷或ALS样神经病理改变，但纯合子突变体过早死亡。这些发现为SPTLC1外显子2的生物学功能提供了有价值的见解，并为未来的机制研究提供了有用资源。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2026年最新发表的ALS相关SPTLC1突变，利用CRISPR/Cas9技术构建了首个体内外显子2缺失小鼠模型，直接关联ALS发病机制，具有高度转化价值。

items.title: Preparing Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Clinics to Provide Longitudinal Care for Individuals Carrying ALS Risk Variants.
items.summary: Emerging genetic therapies and the expansion of genetic testing are identifying individuals carrying amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) risk variants who would benefit from surveillance and early intervention. Anticipating the geographic distribution and clinical needs of this population is essential for optimizing care delivery and ensuring readiness as new therapies become available. We estimate the number of individuals in the United States carrying ALS risk variants and project the clinical engagement required to support this population. This is especially timely because ALS clinics are already grappling with rising numbers of patients with symptomatic ALS and deep funding cuts. We developed a population model to estimate the number of symptomatic individuals with gene-positive ALS and asymptomatic gene carriers across US states over the next decade (year 1: 2026). State-level ALS prevalence and incidence were calculated using 2 approaches: (1) race-adjusted ALS rates from the Atlanta metropolitan study applied to 2023 Census demographics and (2) observed state-level ALS case counts from the National ALS Registry (2011-2018). Gene-positive cases were estimated using published frequencies of SOD1 , C9orf72 , FUS , and TARDBP pathogenic variants. At-risk relatives were modeled assuming autosomal-dominant inheritance with ∼5 first-degree and ∼7 second-degree living relatives per proband, and broad uptake of cascade genetic testing. Surveillance needs were modeled as 1 annual visit per asymptomatic carrier, which was normalized by the number of ALS centers per state. In year 1 (2026), the model estimated 2,704 symptomatic gene-positive ALS carriers. With an average of 4.25 carrier relatives per proband, 10,944 asymptomatic carriers were projected nationwide. Most states required <50 additional visits per clinic annually, with 12 states in the 50-99 range and none exceeding 100. By year 10 (2035), the model projected 7,474 symptomatic and 26,111 asymptomatic carriers. State-level demand shifted substantially: only 6 states remained below 50 visits per clinic annually; 22 reached 50-99; 18 reached 100-199; and 3 exceeded 200. Gene-targeted testing is projected to substantially increase ALS clinic visits among asymptomatic gene carriers. While current infrastructure may accommodate the initial rise, within a decade, most states will require significant expansion. Anticipating and planning for this growth now is essential to ensure seamless integration of gene-positive individuals into ALS care.
items.titleZh: 准备肌萎缩侧索硬化症诊所，为携带ALS风险变异个体提供长期照护
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过人口模型预测，随着基因检测普及，美国ALS诊所未来十年内无症状基因携带者的就诊需求将大幅增加，从2026年的约1.1万人增至2035年的约2.6万人，多数州需在十年内扩展临床基础设施。
items.insight: 这项研究为ALS领域提供了首个基于人口模型的量化预测，揭示了基因检测扩大后无症状携带者对临床服务的潜在冲击，对资源规划和政策制定具有直接指导意义。

aiRead.keyFinding: 到2035年，美国无症状ALS基因携带者数量将增至约2.6万人，多数州ALS诊所每年需增加100次以上就诊。
aiRead.limitation: 模型依赖于假设的遗传模式、亲属数量和级联检测接受率，可能高估或低估实际需求。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注实际临床数据验证模型预测，以及各州ALS诊所的扩展计划和资金分配策略。

items.abstractZh: 新兴的基因治疗和基因检测的扩展正在识别出携带肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）风险变异的个体，这些人将从监测和早期干预中受益。预测这一人群的地理分布和临床需求对于优化医疗服务提供和确保新疗法可用时的准备至关重要。我们估算了美国携带ALS风险变异的人数，并预测了支持这一人群所需的临床参与。这尤其及时，因为ALS诊所已经在应对症状性ALS患者数量上升和资金大幅削减的问题。我们开发了一个人口模型，以估算未来十年（第1年：2026年）美国各州基因阳性症状性ALS患者和无症状基因携带者的数量。州级ALS患病率和发病率通过两种方法计算：（1）将亚特兰大都市研究的种族调整ALS率应用于2023年人口普查人口统计数据；（2）来自国家ALS登记处（2011-2018年）的观察到的州级ALS病例数。基因阳性病例使用SOD1、C9orf72、FUS和TARDBP致病性变异的已发表频率进行估算。风险亲属建模假设常染色体显性遗传，每个先证者约有5名一级和约7名二级在世亲属，并广泛采用级联基因检测。监测需求建模为每位无症状携带者每年一次就诊，并按各州ALS中心数量进行标准化。在第1年（2026年），模型估计有2,704名基因阳性症状性ALS携带者。每个先证者平均有4.25名携带者亲属，全国范围内预计有10,944名无症状携带者。大多数州每个诊所每年需要少于50次额外就诊，12个州在50-99次范围内，没有州超过100次。到第10年（2035年），模型预计有7,474名症状性和26,111名无症状携带者。州级需求显著变化：只有6个州每个诊所每年就诊次数低于50次；22个州达到50-99次；18个州达到100-199次；3个州超过200次。基因靶向检测预计将显著增加无症状基因携带者的ALS诊所就诊次数。虽然当前基础设施可能适应初期增长，但在十年内，大多数州将需要显著扩展。现在预测并规划这一增长对于确保基因阳性个体无缝融入ALS照护至关重要。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于最新人口数据和基因频率，首次系统预测了ALS风险变异携带者的临床需求增长，具有高度的ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Patient-Reported Symptom Burden in Individuals With Parkinson Disease.
items.summary: To better understand Parkinson disease (PD) burden and advance the clinical management of patients, it is important to ascertain the most significant symptoms directly from individuals with PD. This research used patient-reported data to identify the most prevalent and impactful symptoms experienced by individuals with PD and determine the demographic and clinical characteristics that are associated with higher symptomatic burden. We conducted semistructured qualitative interviews of 20 individuals with self-reported PD, obtaining 2,978 quotes regarding potential symptoms of importance. Findings from these interviews informed the development of a cross-sectional survey study designed to asess the impact of these symptoms in a larger cohort. Four-hundred four participants with self-reported PD participated in the survey study, providing the prevalence and relative importance (0-4 scale) of 301 symptoms representing 14 symptomatic themes. We subsequently performed subgroup analysis to identify demographic and clinical characteristics that were associated with a higher prevalence of symptomatic burden in PD. The most prevalent symptomatic themes identified by participants were sleep disturbances and daytime sleepiness (87.0%) and fatigue (84.7%). The symptomatic themes with the greatest impact (0-4) on participants' lives were fatigue (1.34) and sleep disturbances and daytime sleepiness (1.29). A higher prevalence of disease burden across all symptomatic themes was most strongly associated with speech impairment, gait freezing, and a duration of tremor greater than 5 years. The impact of PD on the lives of those living with this disease is multisystemic, reaching beyond the cardinal motor symptoms. Fatigue, sleep disturbances, and daytime sleepiness are highly prevalent and important to this population.
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者自我报告的症状负担
items.summaryZh: 这项研究通过患者自我报告数据，发现帕金森病患者最常见的症状是睡眠障碍/白天嗜睡（87%）和疲劳（84.7%），且这些非运动症状对生活的影响最大。言语障碍、步态冻结和长期震颤与更高的整体症状负担相关。
items.insight: 该研究强调了非运动症状（如疲劳和睡眠障碍）在帕金森病中的核心地位，提示ALS等神经退行性疾病的临床评估和干预也应重视患者自我报告的非运动症状负担，而不仅限于运动功能。

aiRead.studyType: 横断面调查研究结合定性访谈
aiRead.keyFinding: 帕金森病患者最普遍且影响最大的症状是疲劳和睡眠障碍/白天嗜睡，而非传统运动症状。
aiRead.limitation: 研究依赖患者自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚；样本量相对较小（404人），且未纳入客观临床评估。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否在ALS队列中验证类似非运动症状负担，以及开发针对疲劳和睡眠障碍的干预措施。

items.abstractZh: 为了更好地理解帕金森病（PD）的负担并推进患者的临床管理，直接从PD患者那里获取最重要的症状至关重要。本研究利用患者报告的数据，识别PD患者最常见和影响最大的症状，并确定与较高症状负担相关的人口学和临床特征。我们对20名自我报告患有PD的个体进行了半结构化定性访谈，获得了2978条关于潜在重要症状的引述。这些访谈结果指导了一项横断面调查研究的设计，旨在评估这些症状在更大队列中的影响。404名自我报告患有PD的参与者参与了调查研究，提供了301个症状（代表14个症状主题）的患病率和相对重要性（0-4分）。随后我们进行了亚组分析，以确定与PD症状负担较高患病率相关的人口学和临床特征。参与者识别的最常见症状主题是睡眠障碍和白天嗜睡（87.0%）以及疲劳（84.7%）。对参与者生活影响最大（0-4分）的症状主题是疲劳（1.34）和睡眠障碍及白天嗜睡（1.29）。所有症状主题中疾病负担的较高患病率与言语障碍、步态冻结和震颤持续时间超过5年最强相关。PD对患者生活的影响是多系统的，超出了核心运动症状。疲劳、睡眠障碍和白天嗜睡在该人群中非常普遍且重要。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究近期（2026年）通过大规模患者报告数据，揭示了帕金森病中非运动症状的高负担，对ALS等神经退行性疾病的症状管理具有转化价值。

items.title: Innate immune crosstalk in ALS/FTD pathogenesis.
items.summary: Marked by protein aggregation, impaired proteostasis, organelle stress, and chronic neuroinflammation, amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD) form a clinically, genetically, and pathologically overlapping disease spectrum. Increasing evidence indicates that innate immune activation is not merely a secondary response to neuronal injury, but an active driver of disease progression. In this review, we elaborate on how ALS/FTD-associated genetic lesions and pathogenic protein aggregates, including TDP-43, SOD1, FUS, and C9orf72-derived dipeptide repeat proteins, engage three interconnected innate immune pathways: cGAS-STING, NLRP3 inflammasomes, and TREM2-DAP12 signaling. We further highlight emerging crosstalk among these pathways, in which cGAS-STING and NLRP3 reinforce inflammatory signaling, while NLRP3-driven TREM2 shedding may impair microglial clearance and perpetuate proteostatic failure. Understanding this immune network may help define disease subtypes, identify biomarkers, and guide combinatorial therapeutic strategies that suppress harmful inflammation while preserving protective microglial functions.
items.titleZh: ALS/FTD发病机制中的先天免疫串扰
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述指出，在ALS和FTD中，先天免疫激活不仅是神经损伤的被动反应，更是疾病进展的主动推手。文章重点分析了cGAS-STING、NLRP3炎症小体和TREM2-DAP12三条免疫通路如何被致病蛋白（如TDP-43、SOD1、FUS和C9orf72）激活，并揭示了它们之间的相互增强关系，为寻找新的治疗靶点和生物标志物提供了思路。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS/FTD中三条关键先天免疫通路的串扰机制，特别是cGAS-STING与NLRP3的协同作用以及TREM2脱落对蛋白稳态的破坏，为研究者提供了从免疫网络角度理解疾病异质性和开发组合疗法的框架。

aiRead.keyFinding: ALS/FTD中cGAS-STING、NLRP3和TREM2-DAP12三条先天免疫通路相互串扰，共同驱动神经炎症和蛋白质稳态失败。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始实验数据，结论基于现有文献的整合。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对cGAS-STING或NLRP3通路的抑制剂在ALS/FTD动物模型中的验证研究。

items.abstractZh: 以蛋白质聚集、蛋白质稳态受损、细胞器应激和慢性神经炎症为特征，肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）构成了一个临床、遗传和病理上重叠的疾病谱。越来越多的证据表明，先天免疫激活不仅是神经元损伤的继发性反应，而且是疾病进展的主动驱动因素。在本综述中，我们详细阐述了ALS/FTD相关的遗传病变和致病性蛋白质聚集体（包括TDP-43、SOD1、FUS和C9orf72衍生的二肽重复蛋白）如何参与三个相互关联的先天免疫通路：cGAS-STING、NLRP3炎症小体和TREM2-DAP12信号传导。我们进一步强调了这些通路之间新出现的串扰，其中cGAS-STING和NLRP3增强炎症信号，而NLRP3驱动的TREM2脱落可能损害小胶质细胞清除功能并延续蛋白质稳态失败。理解这一免疫网络可能有助于定义疾病亚型、识别生物标志物，并指导组合治疗策略，以抑制有害炎症同时保留保护性小胶质细胞功能。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，聚焦于ALS/FTD中先天免疫通路的最新串扰机制，具有高度ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Recovery: A New Model System of Care Integrating Neuromuscular Rehabilitation With Clinical Stabilization in ALS.
items.summary: There is currently no consensus on how to define recovery for individuals with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). Tofersen treatment for superoxide dismutase-1-related (SOD1) ALS marks a pivot in clinical management: for the first time, clinicians can target disease stabilization and functional recovery in some individuals. This advancement shifts the focus of ALS care toward optimizing functional recovery alongside symptomatic management. However, there are no evidence-based guidelines for prescribing neuromuscular rehabilitation (NMR) to improve functional recovery. Building on our preliminary single-center data of integrated NMR with tofersen, we propose a new ALS Recovery Model System of Care, utilizing a hub-and-spoke infrastructure to combine NMR with novel therapies. This model aims to define ALS recovery, characterize recovery profiles, standardize NMR protocols, and establish a rehabilitation framework adaptable to future disease-stabilizing therapies.
items.titleZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症康复：一种整合神经肌肉康复与临床稳定的ALS新型护理模式系统
items.summaryZh: 本文提出了一种整合神经肌肉康复与Tofersen等新型疗法的ALS护理新模式，旨在定义和优化ALS患者的康复过程，并建立标准化的康复方案。
items.insight: 该研究首次系统性地提出了将神经肌肉康复与疾病修饰治疗（如Tofersen）相结合的护理模式，为ALS患者的功能恢复提供了新的临床管理框架，值得ALS研究者关注其在真实世界中的实施效果。

aiRead.keyFinding: 提出了一种整合神经肌肉康复与新型疗法的ALS康复模式系统，旨在定义康复、标准化方案并适应未来疗法。
aiRead.limitation: 该模型基于初步单中心数据，尚未经过多中心验证或随机对照试验证实。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注该模型在更大样本中的实施数据，以及是否出现针对其他ALS亚型的类似康复整合方案。

items.abstractZh: 目前对于如何定义肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）患者的康复尚无共识。针对超氧化物歧化酶-1相关（SOD1）ALS的Tofersen治疗标志着临床管理的转折点：临床医生首次能够针对部分患者实现疾病稳定和功能恢复。这一进展将ALS护理的重点转向在症状管理的同时优化功能恢复。然而，目前尚无基于证据的指南来指导处方神经肌肉康复（NMR）以改善功能恢复。基于我们初步的单中心数据（整合NMR与Tofersen），我们提出了一种新的ALS康复模式护理系统，利用中心辐射式基础设施将NMR与新型疗法相结合。该模型旨在定义ALS康复、描述康复特征、标准化NMR方案，并建立一个可适应未来疾病稳定疗法的康复框架。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2023年获批的Tofersen治疗SOD1-ALS的最新临床实践，提出了整合康复与疾病稳定治疗的前沿护理模式，具有直接的ALS转化价值。

items.title: Two Patients With Juvenile-Onset, Rapidly Progressive Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis Associated With an SOD1 Variant (p.Asp125Gly) With Incomplete Penetrance.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) patients are rarely encountered before age 25 years, often associated with genetic variants. SOD1 gene variants are well-known to account for a subset of adult-onset ALS but have only been described in a handful of early onset patients. Variants affecting residue 125 in SOD1 have been described in adult-onset ALS patients with a rapid progression. Here we report two such patients. The clinical, genetic, and electrodiagnostic findings of two unrelated adolescents with juvenile onset rapidly progressive SOD1 -ALS are described. Patient 1 presented at 16 and patient 2 at 15 years-of-age with lower limb onset of weakness, lower motor neuron examination findings, and rapid progression over months to involve all body regions. Both patients underwent extensive laboratory, electrophysiologic, and radiologic testing ruling out any alternate etiologies. For both patients, whole-exome sequencing revealed the pathogenic variant p.Asp125Gly in the SOD1 gene inherited from asymptomatic fathers. These two patients expand the phenotypic spectrum of SOD1 -ALS, demonstrating a rapidly progressive juvenile lower limb onset phenotype associated with the p.Asp125Gly variant inherited with incomplete penetrance. Recognition and further characterization of juvenile SOD1 -ALS are important in light of the advances in targeted therapies.
items.titleZh: 两名与SOD1变异（p.Asp125Gly）相关的青少年发病、快速进展型肌萎缩侧索硬化症患者，伴不完全外显率
items.summaryZh: 报告两例15-16岁发病的快速进展型ALS患者，携带SOD1 p.Asp125Gly变异，来自无症状父亲，提示该变异不完全外显，扩展了青少年SOD1-ALS的表型谱。
items.insight: 该研究首次详细描述了SOD1 p.Asp125Gly变异在青少年中引发快速进展型ALS的临床特征，强调了不完全外显的遗传模式，对SOD1靶向治疗（如tofersen）的早期识别和临床试验入组具有重要参考价值。

aiRead.keyFinding: SOD1 p.Asp125Gly变异可导致青少年发病、快速进展的下肢起病ALS，且来自无症状父亲，呈不完全外显。
aiRead.limitation: 仅2例患者，样本量极小，无法评估变异频率或外显率；缺乏功能验证实验。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注更大样本的青少年SOD1-ALS队列研究，以及p.Asp125Gly变异携带者的长期随访和靶向治疗反应数据。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）患者很少在25岁前发病，常与遗传变异相关。已知SOD1基因变异可解释一部分成人发病的ALS，但仅在少数早发型患者中被描述。影响SOD1第125位残基的变异已在快速进展的成人发病ALS患者中被报道。本文报告了两例此类患者。描述了两名无血缘关系的青少年，患有青少年发病、快速进展的SOD1-ALS，其临床、遗传和电诊断结果。患者1在16岁、患者2在15岁时出现下肢起病的无力、下运动神经元体征，并在数月内快速进展累及全身。两名患者均接受了广泛的实验室、电生理和影像学检查，排除了其他病因。全外显子组测序显示，两名患者均携带SOD1基因的致病性变异p.Asp125Gly，该变异来自无症状的父亲。这两例患者扩展了SOD1-ALS的表型谱，展示了与p.Asp125Gly变异相关的快速进展性青少年下肢起病表型，且该变异呈不完全外显遗传。鉴于靶向治疗的进展，识别和进一步描述青少年SOD1-ALS具有重要意义。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究新近报道了SOD1 p.Asp125Gly变异在青少年ALS中的表型扩展，直接关联SOD1靶向治疗的临床转化价值。

items.title: The Flail Limb Syndrome.
items.summary: The flail limb syndrome is primarily a lower motor neuron disorder that initially affects proximal arm muscles (flail arm syndrome-FAS) or distal leg muscles (flail leg syndrome-FLS). Both were recognized early on (1886 for FAS and 1918 for FLS) as somewhat distinct from classic amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). Descriptions in the literature are case series with limited information on electrophysiologic features (central and peripheral), cognitive involvement, and genetic mutations. What follows is a compilation of these features. The flail limb syndromes are rare, representing ~7%-8% of ALS. They have a higher ratio of males to females compared to classic ALS. Both are defined by predominant focal arm or leg weakness for ~2 years before progression to other regions, although there can be early and mild clinical or electrophysiologic evidence for denervation and reinnervation in other regions during the initial period. Ultimately, there is progression to respiratory failure, but at a slower rate compared to classic ALS. Upper motor neuron clinical signs are variable, but transcortical magnetic stimulation paradigms and magnetic resonance imaging tractography support upper motor neuron loss. Tests of the split hand pattern show it is rare compared to ALS. Dementia is also rare. Genetic testing supports a spectrum of ALS-related gene mutations but at a lower frequency than with classic ALS, and no gene mutation is predominant. Diagnosis requires ~2 years of regional stability to predict the better prognosis for the flail limb syndromes.
items.titleZh: 连枷肢体综合征
items.summaryZh: 连枷肢体综合征是ALS的一种罕见亚型，约占7%-8%，以局灶性肢体无力为特征，进展较经典ALS慢，预后相对较好。男性更常见，上运动神经元受累证据存在但多变，痴呆和分裂手模式罕见。基因突变谱与ALS相关但频率较低。诊断需观察约2年的区域稳定性。
items.insight: 该综述系统总结了连枷肢体综合征的临床、电生理、影像和遗传特征，明确了其与经典ALS的异同，为ALS亚型的精准诊断和预后判断提供了重要参考，值得ALS研究者关注以优化临床试验分层和患者管理。

aiRead.keyFinding: 连枷肢体综合征是ALS的罕见亚型，以局灶性肢体无力为特征，进展较慢，预后较好，上运动神经元受累证据存在但多变，基因突变频率较低。
aiRead.limitation: 文献来源主要为病例系列，缺乏大规模前瞻性研究，电生理和遗传特征信息有限。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注连枷肢体综合征的前瞻性队列研究，以及其与经典ALS在治疗反应和生存期上的差异分析。

items.abstractZh: 连枷肢体综合征主要是一种下运动神经元疾病，最初影响近端手臂肌肉（连枷臂综合征，FAS）或远端腿部肌肉（连枷腿综合征，FLS）。两者在早期（FAS于1886年，FLS于1918年）就被认为与经典肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）有所区别。文献中的描述为病例系列，关于电生理特征（中枢和周围）、认知受累和基因突变的信息有限。以下是对这些特征的汇编。连枷肢体综合征罕见，约占ALS的7%-8%。与经典ALS相比，男性与女性的比例更高。两者的定义是在进展到其他区域之前，局灶性手臂或腿部无力持续约2年，尽管在初期其他区域可能存在早期且轻微的临床或电生理证据表明失神经和神经再支配。最终，会进展至呼吸衰竭，但速度比经典ALS慢。上运动神经元临床体征多变，但经颅磁刺激范式和磁共振成像纤维束成像支持上运动神经元丢失。分裂手模式的测试显示其比ALS罕见。痴呆也罕见。基因检测支持存在一系列ALS相关基因突变，但频率低于经典ALS，且没有主要基因突变。诊断需要约2年的区域稳定性，以预测连枷肢体综合征较好的预后。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述整合了近期关于连枷肢体综合征的多维度特征，强调了其作为ALS亚型的独特性和诊断标准，对ALS的精准分型和预后评估具有直接的转化价值。

items.title: PBMC DEG/miRNA biomarkers of TDP-43 pathology in ALS.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) lacks reliable, disease-specific, and minimally invasive biomarkers, representing a major barrier to early diagnosis and patient stratification. The primary aim of this translational pilot study was to identify a disease-specific, TDP-43-related, gene-microRNA (miRNA) signature in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of ALS patients with potential diagnostic value. To this end, we first identified differentially expressed disease-specific genes (dsDEGs) using a TDP-43-based rat model of ALS, generated by stereotaxic infusion of full-length (FL) TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43) into the motor cortex. Transcriptomic profiling of the motor cortex revealed candidate dsDEGs, which were subsequently validated by RT-qPCR in motor cortex, spinal cord, and PBMCs from the same animals. To assess translational relevance, expression levels of these dsDEGs were analyzed in PBMCs from early- to mid-stage ALS patients and matched healthy controls, while disease specificity was evaluated using Parkinson's disease (PD) samples. In parallel, conserved miRNAs predicted to target the identified dsDEGs were examined in both rat and human PBMCs. Five dsDEGs, Mctp1, Penk, Mt2A, Drd1, and Rasgrp2, were consistently dysregulated across central and peripheral tissues in the TDP-43 rat model. RT-qPCR analysis of human PBMCs confirmed significant and selective dysregulation of these genes in ALS, but not in PD, supporting disease specificity. Moreover, exposure of human neuroblastoma cells and healthy PBMCs to TDP-43 recapitulated the ALS-like expression changes. Computational and experimental analyses identified seven conserved miRNAs targeting these dsDEGs, of which four were significantly downregulated in ALS PBMCs, supporting a coordinated regulatory network. Receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analyses demonstrated strong discriminative performance for both the gene signature (AUC 0.87-1.00) and the associated miRNAs (AUC 0.95-1.00). Together, these findings define a novel PBMC-based gene-miRNA signature that mirrors central ALS pathology and shows high diagnostic accuracy and disease specificity, highlighting its potential as a minimally invasive biomarker for ALS.
items.titleZh: ALS中TDP-43病理的PBMC DEG/miRNA生物标志物
items.summaryZh: 本研究在ALS患者的PBMC中发现了一组由5个基因和4个miRNA组成的特征，能高准确度区分ALS患者与健康对照及帕金森病患者，且与中枢TDP-43病理相关。
items.insight: 该研究提供了一种基于外周血的、疾病特异性的基因-miRNA组合标志物，有望用于ALS的早期诊断和患者分层，且其与TDP-43病理的直接关联为理解疾病机制提供了新工具。

aiRead.studyType: 转化性观察研究（动物模型+临床样本验证）
aiRead.keyFinding: 在ALS患者PBMC中鉴定出5个基因（Mctp1、Penk、Mt2A、Drd1、Rasgrp2）和4个miRNA组成的特征，可高准确度区分ALS与健康对照及帕金森病。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量较小（早期至中期ALS患者），且未在独立队列中验证；动物模型为急性TDP-43过表达，可能不完全模拟慢性ALS病理。
aiRead.watchNext: 需在更大、更多样化的ALS队列中验证该标志物，并探索其与疾病进展和TDP-43病理严重程度的相关性。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）缺乏可靠、疾病特异且微创的生物标志物，这构成了早期诊断和患者分层的主要障碍。这项转化性初步研究的主要目的是在ALS患者的外周血单核细胞（PBMC）中识别一种疾病特异性的、与TDP-43相关的基因-微小RNA（miRNA）特征，并评估其诊断价值。为此，我们首先使用基于TDP-43的大鼠ALS模型（通过将全长TDP-43立体定向注入运动皮层生成）识别差异表达的疾病特异性基因（dsDEG）。运动皮层的转录组分析揭示了候选dsDEG，随后通过RT-qPCR在同一动物的运动皮层、脊髓和PBMC中进行验证。为评估转化相关性，分析了早期至中期ALS患者和匹配健康对照PBMC中这些dsDEG的表达水平，并使用帕金森病（PD）样本评估疾病特异性。同时，在人和大鼠PBMC中检测了预测靶向所识别dsDEG的保守miRNA。在TDP-43大鼠模型中，五个dsDEG（Mctp1、Penk、Mt2A、Drd1和Rasgrp2）在中枢和外周组织中一致失调。人PBMC的RT-qPCR分析证实这些基因在ALS中显著且选择性地失调，而在PD中未观察到，支持其疾病特异性。此外，将人神经母细胞瘤细胞和健康PBMC暴露于TDP-43可重现类似ALS的表达变化。计算和实验分析识别了七个靶向这些dsDEG的保守miRNA，其中四个在ALS PBMC中显著下调，支持一个协调的调控网络。受试者工作特征（ROC）分析显示，基因特征（AUC 0.87-1.00）和相关miRNA（AUC 0.95-1.00）均具有强大的区分性能。总之，这些发现定义了一种新的基于PBMC的基因-miRNA特征，该特征反映了中枢ALS病理，并显示出高诊断准确性和疾病特异性，突显了其作为ALS微创生物标志物的潜力。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究于2026年发表，首次在ALS患者PBMC中鉴定出与中枢TDP-43病理直接相关的基因-miRNA特征，具有高诊断准确性，为微创生物标志物开发提供了新方向。

items.title: Very low-amplitude muscle activity increases probability of motor evoked potentials in healthy individuals and in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
items.summary: Muscle contraction increases motor evoked potential (MEP) amplitude, decreasing motor threshold (MT). Correspondingly, trials where baseline EMG amplitude exceeds a specified threshold are often rejected. We aimed to investigate the influence of motor activity below such a threshold of MEP amplitude. We retrospectively analysed TMS-EMG data collected during resting MT (RMT) measurement in 45 healthy control subjects (1794 data points) and 35 people with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS; 1229 data points). Trials with de-meaned root mean squared (RMS) EMG amplitude of >10 µV throughout the 200 ms prior to stimulation were rejected. Generalised linear mixed-effects models assessed effects of muscle activity below this rejection threshold on the probability of evoking an MEP with peak-to-peak amplitude of ≥50 µV. Greater sub-rejection-threshold activity significantly increases MEP probability in control subjects and people with ALS. Models predicted a 38%-43% increase in MEP probability when baseline RMS-EMG amplitude increased from 1 $\hskip.001pt 1$ to 9 µV. Sub-rejection-threshold baseline activity was significantly greater in ALS than control subjects. Below a typical rejection threshold, greater baseline RMS-EMG amplitudes markedly increase the probability of evoking MEPs with peak-to-peak amplitude of ≥50 µV. Effects of sub-rejection-threshold muscle activity should be accounted for when comparing RMT measures, particularly between cohorts where such activity differs, such as ALS and control subjects.
items.titleZh: 极低幅度肌肉活动增加健康个体和肌萎缩侧索硬化症患者运动诱发电位的概率
items.summaryZh: 该研究分析了TMS-EMG数据，发现即使基线肌电活动低于常规剔除阈值（10 µV），其小幅增加也会显著提高运动诱发电位（MEP）的诱发概率。在ALS患者中，这种亚阈值活动水平高于健康对照，提示在比较静息运动阈值时需校正此差异。
items.insight: 该研究揭示了ALS患者中常被忽视的细微肌肉活动对TMS测量结果的影响，为优化运动阈值评估和跨队列比较提供了方法学依据，对ALS神经生理学研究和临床试验终点选择具有重要参考价值。

aiRead.studyType: 回顾性观察性临床研究
aiRead.keyFinding: 低于常规剔除阈值的基线肌电活动（1-9 µV）显著增加MEP诱发概率，且ALS患者的此类活动高于健康对照。
aiRead.limitation: 回顾性设计，样本量有限，未直接评估不同剔除阈值对临床结果的影响。
aiRead.watchNext: 前瞻性研究验证亚阈值活动校正对RMT测量和ALS疾病进展预测的临床价值。

items.abstractZh: 肌肉收缩会增加运动诱发电位（MEP）的幅度，降低运动阈值（MT）。相应地，基线肌电图（EMG）幅度超过特定阈值的试验通常被剔除。我们旨在研究低于该阈值的运动活动对MEP幅度的影响。我们回顾性分析了在静息运动阈值（RMT）测量期间收集的TMS-EMG数据，包括45名健康对照受试者（1794个数据点）和35名肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）患者（1229个数据点）。刺激前200毫秒内去均方根（RMS）EMG幅度>10 µV的试验被剔除。广义线性混合效应模型评估了低于此剔除阈值的肌肉活动对诱发峰-峰幅度≥50 µV的MEP概率的影响。在对照受试者和ALS患者中，更大的亚剔除阈值活动显著增加了MEP概率。模型预测，当基线RMS-EMG幅度从1 µV增加到9 µV时，MEP概率增加38%-43%。ALS患者的亚剔除阈值基线活动显著高于对照受试者。在典型剔除阈值以下，更大的基线RMS-EMG幅度显著增加了诱发峰-峰幅度≥50 µV的MEP的概率。在比较RMT测量值时，尤其是在ALS和对照受试者等此类活动存在差异的队列之间，应考虑亚剔除阈值肌肉活动的影响。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究于2026年发表，聚焦ALS患者与健康对照在TMS测量中基线肌电活动的细微差异，具有直接的ALS相关性，并提出了改进临床神经生理评估方法的新见解。

items.summaryZh: 该文章探讨了在遗传性肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）谱系疾病中，致病突变携带者并不总是表现出临床症状的现象，即外显率降低。文章重点分析了这一现象对遗传咨询、预测性基因检测以及未来治疗策略的深远影响。
items.insight: 对于ALS研究者而言，外显率降低是理解疾病发病机制和家族遗传风险的关键概念。本文直接挑战了“携带致病基因突变必然发病”的传统观念，为解释家族性ALS中“不完全外显”的临床现象提供了理论框架，并指导如何更精准地进行遗传咨询和风险分层，对开展基因治疗和预防性临床试验的设计具有重要参考价值。

aiRead.keyFinding: 遗传性ALS/FTD谱系疾病中存在显著的外显率降低现象，即部分致病突变携带者终身不发病，这要求遗传咨询和预测性检测必须考虑不完全外显的风险，并可能影响未来治疗策略的制定。
aiRead.limitation: 原文未提供摘要，无法评估其具体论证方法和数据来源，因此结论的可靠性需结合全文判断。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续针对特定基因（如C9orf72、SOD1、TARDBP等）外显率修饰因子的研究，以及基于外显率数据更新的遗传咨询指南。

items.title: Paid homecare worker support for people living with motor neurone disease: A secondary analysis of people living with motor neurone disease and family member perspectives.
items.summary: People living with motor neurone disease (MND) increasingly receive complex, life-sustaining interventions at home, including ventilation, tube feeding, and cough assist support. These demands place substantial strain on family carers and often require input from paid homecare workers. Despite their essential role, little is known about how homecare workers contribute to complex MND care, how they integrate within multidisciplinary teams, or how families experience their involvement. To examine people living with MND and family members' perspectives of homecare worker roles, responsibilities, relationships when complex interventions are required. A qualitative secondary analysis of data from two prior studies exploring home ventilation and tracheostomy ventilation in MND. Seven relevant NVivo nodes and 33 sub-nodes from interviews with 68 participants were re-coded using a deductive framework. Fourteen new nodes and 11 sub-nodes were generated and organised into three themes: care commissioning and provision; relationships; and the home environment. Participants described fragmented and inconsistent care commissioning, requiring families to advocate persistently for adequate support. Challenges included funding barriers, high staff turnover, and limited MND-specific knowledge, which undermined trust and compromised safe, effective care. Relationships with homecare workers ranged from highly valued, stable partnerships to strained interactions shaped by competence concerns, emotional labour, and mismatched expectations. The presence of homecare workers and medical equipment transformed the home into a quasi-clinical space, reducing privacy, disrupting routines, and requiring households to adapt around care provision. Yet strong relationships with homecare workers could enhance quality of life. Homecare workers play a critical role in delivering complex home-based MND care, yet quality is inconsistent. Improving training, stabilising staffing, supporting care coordination, and preparing families for the relational and environmental impact of homecare are essential for fostering sustainable, trusted care relationships, and improving outcomes for people living with MND and their families. Paid homecare support for people with motor neurone disease: Insights from people with MND and their families This study explores how people living with motor neurone disease (MND), and their family members, experience support from paid homecare workers when complex medical interventions, such as ventilation, feeding tubes, suction and hoists are needed at home. As care needs increase, families often need help from paid homecare workers, yet no research has asked families about what this support is like. To address this, we re-analysed interview data from two earlier studies about living with home ventilation in MND, and developed three main themes: Care commissioning and provision: Participants described the process of securing a care package as confusing and often exhausting, with multiple organisations involved. Families frequently had to push to get the support they needed. Problems included shortages of trained staff, high staff turnover, and delays caused by complex funding rules. Relationships with homecare workers: Good homecare workers made a huge positive difference. Relationships with homecare workers ranged from highly positive, built on trust, skill and becoming ‘part of the family’, to strained, particularly when workers lacked MND-specific training or confidence with equipment. Trust was crucial: when present it eased pressure on families but when absent it increased stress and vigilance. Impact on the home environment: Having carers in the house, changed home life, reducing privacy, disrupting household routines, and living spaces became filled with medical equipment and ever-present homecare workers. Families described feeling like hosts in their own homes and sometimes having to manage the emotional labour of being polite or accommodating even when exhausted. Overall, the study shows that homecare workers play an essential role in complex MND care, but quality is inconsistent. Better coordination and support for families to manage these close relationships within the home are vital to reduce pressure on families and improve quality of life.
